name: brew
description: The missing package manager for macOS

name: --cask
options.description: Treat the argument as a cask

name: --HEAD
options.description: Install the development version from the repository head

subcommands.name: update
subcommands.description: Fetch the newest version of Homebrew and formulae

args.name: text
args.description: Text or regex to search for

subcommands.name: info
subcommands.description: Show information about a formula or cask

subcommands.name: doctor
subcommands.description: Check the system for potential problems

subcommands.name: cleanup
subcommands.description: Remove stale downloads and old versions
